category_sources: source_facts.description says it works with a series of patches; Savannah project page is the upstream Quilt project.

docs_sources: Official Savannah project page is the upstream project and best official documentation surface found in this review.
repo_sources: Savannah/GNU Git documentation gives the official Git URL pattern; search results for Quilt code locations identify git.savannah.nongnu.org/quilt.git as the Quilt repository.
